name: Void Ogre Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> オーガ・ドラグーン
desc:
1 DARK Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card while you have no cards in your hand (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.
mnst_eff:
1 DARK Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card while you have no cards in your hand (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.
eff:
1 DARK Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card while you have no cards in your hand (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Attribute specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Does not require specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
